hooks.command: SID=$(python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('session_id','x'))" 2>/dev/null || echo 'x'); F="/tmp/claude_stop_ts_${SID}.txt"; NOW=$(date +%s); LAST=$(cat "$F" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ $((NOW-LAST)) -gt 30 ]; then echo $NOW > "$F"; afplay /System/Library/Sounds/Glass.aiff 2>/dev/null || true; fi
